About Team Industries

Meet the Team

Our lawyers advise on litigation, finance, privacy, labor, and regulatory matters across offices in Chicago, Detroit, and New York.

Maria James

Partner, New York

Maria leads cross-border privacy investigations and advises clients on incident response, vendor diligence, and AI governance.

Liam Porter

Counsel, Chicago

Liam focuses on class actions, product counseling, and consumer protection disputes in state and federal courts.

Sofia Nguyen

Associate, Detroit

Sofia supports commercial finance, restructuring, and secured lending transactions for middle-market lenders.
